innovation_1.name: 基于三层角信号分解的几何双掩码物理模型
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that existing light field estimation methods struggle with feature imbalances due to the lack of a rigorous physical model for multi-domain angular signal decomposition.

innovation_2.name: 面向多域光场数据的域平衡四方向EPI统一估计框架
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a geometric dual-mask physical model based on three-layer angular signal decomposition to mathematically isolate and represent these complex spatial-angular interactions.
